text: I feel an air of quiet anticipation and curiosity here. The first space feels ordered, ready for dialogue or discovery—a meeting room, perhaps, silent except for the echo of potential conversations. Turning to the next scene, I am struck by bold colors and concepts; "R+D" (Research and Development) celebrates human progress, inviting me to ponder how knowledge is created and shared. This is a place where ideas might flourish—my presence feels contemplative, on the edge of innovation and self-inquiry.
